ariaSpec.usage: Describes the hierarchical structure of the Filter component.
Specifies a label for the Filter component.
Each FilterGroup and FilterExpression represent a separate treeitem in the Filter component structure.
Represents a group of items in the Filter component.
The role represents a collection of tools.
Specifies a label for the toolbar.

kbSpec.behavior: Focuses the previous item (FilterGroup or FilterExpression) in the `tree`.
Focuses the next item (FilterGroup or FilterExpression) in the `tree`.
